# Zorvia Cabs

> Zorvia Cabs is a Tempo Traveller rental, taxi and cab service based in Sanganer, Jaipur, Rajasthan. We provide 9, 12, 17 and 20 seater AC and luxury Tempo Travellers, Force Urbania, Innova Crysta and sedans for local sightseeing, airport transfers, weddings, corporate travel, pilgrimage tours and outstation trips across Rajasthan and India. Booking and support are available 24x7.

- Business name: Zorvia Cabs
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 9829951375
- Email: zorviacabs@gmail.com
- Address: Shree Ganesh Apartment, Kalyanpura, Sanganer, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302020
- Website: https://zorviacabs.github.io/
- Hours: Open 24 hours, all days
- Service area: Jaipur and all of Rajasthan, with outstation trips across India
- Payments accepted: Cash, UPI, Card

## Services

- [Tempo Traveller in Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#fleet): 9, 12, 17 and 20 seater AC and luxury Tempo Traveller on rent.
- [Tempo Traveller Rental Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#fleet): Daily and multi-day rental for family trips, group tours and events.
- [Tempo Traveller Hire Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#fleet): Hire with experienced local drivers for city and outstation travel.
- [Taxi Service in Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#services): Point to point city taxi at fair, transparent fares.
- [Cab Service in Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#services): Sedans and SUVs for local runs, half day and full day hire.
- [Car Rental in Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#services): Self choice of sedan, SUV or premium car with driver.
- [Innova Crysta Rental Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#services): 6 to 7 seater Innova Crysta for families and business travel.
- [Force Urbania Rental Jaipur](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#services): Luxury Force Urbania for premium group travel, weddings and corporate tours.
- [Jaipur Airport Taxi](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#services): Airport pickup and drop with flight tracking.
- [Jaipur Sightseeing Taxi](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#services): Amber Fort, City Palace, Hawa Mahal and more with a local driver.
- [Jaipur Outstation Taxi](https://zorviacabs.github.io/#routes): One way and round trip cabs to any city in India.

## Popular Routes from Jaipur

- Jaipur to Khatu Shyam Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Salasar Balaji Tempo Traveller

- Jaipur to Pushkar Tempo Traveller

- Jaipur to Ayodhya Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Kashi (Varanasi) Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Ujjain Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Omkareshwar Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Mahakaleshwar Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Kedarnath Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Badrinath Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Somnath Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Dwarka Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Shirdi Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Tirupati Tempo Traveller
- Jaipur to Delhi Taxi
- Jaipur to Udaipur Taxi

## Booking

- To book, call or WhatsApp +91 9829951375, or email zorviacabs@gmail.com.
- Share your route, travel dates and group size for an all inclusive fare quote.
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919829951375

## FAQ

- How much does a Tempo Traveller cost in Jaipur? Fares depend on seater size, distance and trip duration. Contact Zorvia Cabs at 9829951375 for an all inclusive quote.
- Which seating options are available? 9, 12, 17 and 20 seater AC and luxury Tempo Travellers, plus Force Urbania and Innova Crysta.
- Do you provide outstation and pilgrimage trips? Yes, including Khatu Shyam, Salasar Balaji, Ajmer, Pushkar, Vaishno Devi, Kedarnath, Delhi and Udaipur.
- Is booking available 24x7? Yes, booking and support are available 24 hours a day on 9829951375.
